quote: Without music, life would be a mistake.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote:
Music expresses that which cannot be put into words
and that which cannot remain silent.
author: Victor Hugo

quote: If music be the food of love, play on.
author: William Shakespeare

quote: None but ourselves can free our minds.
author: Bob Marley

quote: Without deviation from the norm, progress is not possible.
author: Frank Zappa

quote: Some people have lives; some people have music.
author: John Green

quote:
If I were not a physicist, I would probably be a musician.
I often think in music. I live my daydreams in music.
I see my life in terms of music.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: After silence, that which comes nearest to expressing the inexpressible is music.
author: Aldous Huxley

quote: One good thing about music, when it hits you, you feel no pain.
author: Bob Marley

quote: Music is the shorthand of emotion.
author: Leo Tolstoy

quote: Music is enough for a lifetime, but a lifetime is not enough for music.
author: Sergei Rachmaninoff

quote: Where words fail, music speaks.
author: Hans Christian Andersen

quote: Music is the universal language of mankind.
author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

quote: Music is a higher revelation than all wisdom and philosophy.
author: Ludwig van Beethoven

quote:
To stop the flow of music would be like the stopping of time itself,
incredible and inconceivable.
author: Aaron Copland

quote: Music washes away from the soul the dust of everyday life.
author: Berthold Auerbach

quote:
Music should strike fire from the heart of man,
and bring tears from the eyes of woman.
author: Ludwig van Beethoven

quote:
Music is the literature of the heart;
it commences where speech ends.
author: Alphonse de Lamartine

quote:
Music produces a kind of pleasure
which human nature cannot do without.
author: Confucius

quote: Music has charms to soothe a savage breast.
author: William Congreve

quote: Music is the melody whose text is the world.
author: Arthur Schopenhauer

quote: Music is well said to be the speech of angels.
author: Thomas Carlyle

quote:
If I had my life to live over again, I would have made a rule
to read some poetry and listen to some music at least once every week.
author: Charles Darwin

quote:
Next to the Word of God, the noble art of music
is the greatest treasure in the world.
author: Martin Luther

quote: Music is my mistress, and she plays second fiddle to no one.
author: Duke Ellington

quote:
Music can name the unnameable
and communicate the unknowable.
author: Leonard Bernstein

quote:
Music doesn't lie. If there is something to be changed in this world,
then it can only happen through music.
author: Jimi Hendrix

quote:
Music takes us out of the actual and whispers to us dim secrets
that startle our wonder as to who we are, and for what, whence, and whereto.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Music is the only sensual pleasure without vice.
author: Samuel Johnson

quote:
Music has the power of forming the character,
and should therefore be introduced into the education of the young.
author: Aristotle
